specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10,11
  • Processor: Ryzen 5 3600 or Intel Core i5 10400f
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: RX 580 or GTX 1060 6GB
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any Sound Card shall be compatible
  • VR Support: No
  • Additional Notes: These specs are total overkill for the game. These requirements are pretty low as per the today's graphics requirement trends. This game shall run on almost anything that came after 2019.

specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7/8/10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated graphics with DirectX 11 support
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space

specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 or equivalent
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 or equivalent with DirectX 11 support
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound card
  • VR Support: N/A
  • Additional Notes: Road Toad is built on Unreal Engine, and these recommended requirements are intended for an enhanced gaming experience, featuring smoother performance and improved graphical fidelity. A solid-state drive (SSD) is recommended for faster loading times.
